# Q1 2025 Quarterly Report

Prepared by: Finance Team

## Executive Summary

Revenue grew 18% year over year, driven by enterprise contracts. Operating margin improved to 22.4%.

## Detailed Results

- Revenue: $42.1M
- Gross margin: 71%
- Net income: $9.4M
- Headcount: 312
- Key risks: foreign exchange, supplier consolidation.
